notes: This file currently reflects only the T1 powers source that exists in the repository.

powers.name: Awareness

adjudication.duration: instant

levels.description: Alerted Self remains passive. Assess Character reveals stats and skills up to CR Limit = PER + 1, capped at 6. Artifact Appraisal identifies common, uncommon, and masterwork items.

adjudication.duration: instant

levels.description: Assess Character now reveals powers and specials up to CR Limit = PER + 2, capped at 9. Artifact Appraisal identifies rare or lesser items.

adjudication.duration: instant

levels.description: Assess Character reaches CR Limit = PER + 3, capped at 12, and ignores techno-infused invisibility devices. Artifact Appraisal identifies epic or lesser items.

adjudication.duration: instant

levels.description: Assess Character reaches CR Limit = PER + 4, capped at 15. Artifact Appraisal identifies legendary or lesser items.

adjudication.duration: instant

levels.description: Assess Character reaches CR Limit = PER + 5, capped at 18, and results may be shared with party members. Artifact Appraisal identifies demonic, celestial, mythical, or lesser items.

notes: Alerted Self and Awakened Insight are passive.
Assess Character is bonus action, 0 mana, line of sight, and instant.
Artifact Appraisal is bonus action, no mana, touch, and instant.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: You can increase one of your physical stats by 1.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: Now you can use this skill on other people by touching them.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: You can now increase a physical stat by 2.

adjudication.duration: 30 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: People under the effect of this power also gain some physical protection.

adjudication.duration: 8 hours outside portals or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: You can now increase a physical stat by 3, and the physical protection bonus is increased.
If you become incapacitated, you automatically stand up with 1 HP after a turn.
At 5 dots, the cantrip stands you up with 4 HP.

adjudication.duration: until broken or maintenance stops

levels.description: You can paralyze a living target if their roll is lower than yours. While they are controlled, taking damage breaks the spell.

adjudication.duration: until broken or maintenance stops

levels.description: Your controlled target can now be compelled to do simple acts, and ordering them costs a bonus action.

adjudication.duration: until broken or maintenance stops

levels.description: You can control 2 living targets at once and in one turn.

adjudication.duration: until dismissed or maintenance stops

levels.description: Controlling targets is now a bonus action, and compelling orders is now instant and free.

adjudication.duration: until dismissed or maintenance stops

levels.description: You can control 3 mobs at once. This skill can now be used against non-living targets, except summoned ones by another occult skill.
You gain +1 bonus to your social and intimidation dice pools.
At 5 dots, you also get +1 bonus to your mechanical and technological dice pools.

cantrip.description: If you fail to control a creature, or after the control if they are still alive, they will know you did something to them.

notes: Choose an element for your attacks and stick to that element until long rest.

levels.description: Elemental Bolt is a single elemental attack that damages one target directly.
Your Elemental Bolt damage is increased, and you can divide it between two targets.
Damage is further increased. You can change your Elemental Bolt damage type from fire, cold, lightning, acid at will.
Damage is further increased, and total damage divided by 2 can be applied to 3 different targets.
Damage is further increased, necrotic damage type becomes available, and total damage divided by 2 can be applied to 4 different targets.
It does not spend mana and its damage is equal to your Int.
Cantrip damage is increased by 1 and can be used as a bonus action if you have not cast any other harming spell during this turn.
Total cantrip damage divided by 2, rounded up, can be divided to 2 different targets in range.

cantrip.description: You cannot use necrotic damage type as a cantrip.

levels.description: Heals a target and also removes bleeding.
Your healing becomes stronger and can be spread across friendly targets in range.
Your healing becomes stronger and can cure poison, disease, and curse.
Your healing becomes stronger and can also regrow missing limbs.
Your healing becomes stronger and can exceed a target's max health for a single use each day.
A simple wound mending spell. You can heal by 2 HP or stop bleeding.
The healing cantrip becomes stronger and heals 3 HP.
The healing cantrip becomes stronger and heals 4 HP.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: You create a light source on yourself, and targets in your light's range gain +2 hit bonus to their melee and ranged attack dice.

adjudication.duration: 30 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: Hostile targets cannot see the light source, and your light source gains +1 DR.

adjudication.duration: 1 hour outside portals or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: Your light source gains +1 Soak bonus and stronger hit support.

adjudication.duration: 3 hours outside portals or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: Your light source bonuses become +3 hit, +2 DR, and +1 Soak. It also gains a mana restoration effect.

adjudication.duration: 8 hours outside portals or 1 portal duration, whichever is longer

levels.description: Your light source bonuses become +4 hit, +2 DR, and +2 Soak. Expose darkness can reduce or remove darkness-based resistances and immunities while you maintain concentration.
Mana Bonus: +1. Effect: Night Vision. Target: Self.
Mana Bonus: +2. Effect: Night Vision. Target: Self + 1 ally.
Mana Bonus: +3. Effect: Night Vision. Target: Self + 2 allies.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: You create one simple skeleton to fight at your side till it dies (again) or a portal duration.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: You can create 2 simple skeletons, or 1 skeleton king with a 2 handed sword.
You can make a ranged touch attack (necrotic touch) to a target and they take necrotic damage equal to your appearance plus your necromancy level.

adjudication.duration: 60 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: Your undead summons last longer outside portals, gain bonuses to attacks and damage, and you can summon a zombie instead of skeletons.

adjudication.duration: 60 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: Your undead summons gain stronger bonuses, their melee skill becomes 5, your necrotic touch becomes stronger, and you can resurrect a recently fallen human.
You will be the last on a hostile undead's aggro list and gain +1 melee skill.
Your necromancy cantrip melee skill bonus increases to +2.
Hostile undead will not attack you unless you attack first.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: You create a cloak of shadow around you that grants intimidation, stealth, and +1 AC.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: Shadow walk allows you to dive into your shadow and appear near the shadow of a living target.

adjudication.duration: 10 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: Your cloak of shadow becomes stronger and you can manipulate a target's own shadow to attack them.

adjudication.duration: 60 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: Your cloak of shadow can now protect all or selected allies within range.

adjudication.duration: 60 minutes outside portals or 1 portal duration

levels.description: Your cloak of shadow grows stronger and you can summon a shadow soldier.
You can do cosmetic changes on your clothes or armor.
You can also make minor cosmetic appearance modifications on your body.
